name: route-handle
description: TTML-aware routing plugin that helps Codex choose the smallest useful repo location, tool set, and verification path while accounting for local system load and running services.

interface.shortDescription: Route TTML work with system-aware tool selection.
interface.longDescription: Chooses the right TTML source area, Codex skill, local command, and verification level for a requested change. It keeps work scoped to the change cut, checks local system pressure before heavy commands, and avoids overloading the workspace with unnecessary context or processes.
defaultPrompt: Use $route-handle to route this TTML change before editing.
Use $route-handle to choose the right TTML files and checks.
Use $route-handle to inspect local service pressure before running heavy commands.
